title: Playing Soccer 踢足球
scene: Jack和Leo在草地上踢足球，练习传球和射门。

lines.en: Leo, let us play soccer on the field!
lines.zh: Leo，我们去草地上踢足球吧！

lines.en: Good idea! I want to practice kicking.
I will be the goalkeeper. You try to score.
lines.zh: 我来当守门员。你试着射门。

lines.en: Are you ready? Here I come!
Nice kick! But I caught it.
Oh no! Let me try again.
This time I will kick and you defend.
OK, I am ready. Kick it!
Wow, that was fast! Let us keep playing.
lines.zh: 哇，太快了！我们继续踢吧。
